AddTempDLNAIP.description: Enables an IP address for DLNA for an optional duration

AnonymiseDatabase.description: Anonymise the database in a separate file. Optionally returns a link to download the database file

BackupDatabase.description: Backup the database. Optionally returns a link to download the database file

ConfigurePlugin.description: overwrites the entire plugin configuration for the given plugin

ConfigureUI.description:
overwrites the UI configuration
if input is provided, then the entire UI configuration is replaced
if partial is provided, then the partial UI configuration is merged into the existing UI configuration

ConfigureUISetting.description:
sets a single UI key value
key is a dot separated path to the value

DestroyFiles.description: Deletes file entries from the database without deleting the files from the filesystem

Directory.description: Returns an array of paths for the given path

args.name: locale
args.description: Desired collation locale. Determines the order of the directory result. eg. 'en-US', 'pt-BR', ...

DisableDLNA.description: Disables DLNA for an optional duration. Has no effect if DLNA is disabled by default

DownloadFFMpeg.description: Downloads and installs ffmpeg and ffprobe binaries into the configuration directory. Returns the job ID.

EnableDLNA.description: Enables DLNA for an optional duration. Has no effect if DLNA is enabled by default

ExecSQL.description: DANGEROUS: Execute an arbitrary SQL statement without returning any rows.

ExportObjects.description: Returns a link to download the result

FindDefaultFilter.deprecated: default filter now stored in UI config

FindDuplicateScenes.description:
Returns any groups of scenes that are perceptual duplicates within the queried distance
and the difference between their duration is smaller than durationDiff

args.name: duration_diff
args.description:
Max difference in seconds between files in order to be considered for similarity matching.
Fractional seconds are ok: 0.5 will mean only files that have durations within 0.5 seconds between them will be matched based on PHash distance.

FindFile.description: Find a file by its id or path

FindFolder.description: Find a file by its id or path

FindGroups.description: A function which queries Group objects

FindImages.description: A function which queries Scene objects

FindMovies.description: A function which queries Movie objects

FindPerformers.description: A function which queries Performer objects

FindScene.description: Find a scene by ID or Checksum

FindSceneMarkers.description: A function which queries SceneMarker objects

FindScenes.description: A function which queries Scene objects

FindStudios.description: A function which queries Studio objects

GenerateAPIKey.description: Generate and set (or clear) API key

ImageDecrementO.description: Decrements the o-counter for an image. Returns the new value

ImageIncrementO.description: Increments the o-counter for an image. Returns the new value

ImageResetO.description: Resets the o-counter for a image to 0. Returns the new value

ImportObjects.description: Performs an incremental import. Returns the job ID

InstallPackages.description:
Installs the given packages.
If a package is already installed, it will be updated if needed..
If an error occurs when installing a package, the job will continue to install the remaining packages.
Returns the job ID

MarkerWall.description: Retrieve random scene markers for the wall

MetadataAutoTag.description: Start auto-tagging. Returns the job ID

MetadataClean.description: Clean metadata. Returns the job ID

MetadataCleanGenerated.description: Clean generated files. Returns the job ID

MetadataExport.description: Start a full export. Outputs to the metadata directory. Returns the job ID

MetadataGenerate.description: Start generating content. Returns the job ID

MetadataIdentify.description: Identifies scenes using scrapers. Returns the job ID

MetadataImport.description: Start an full import. Completely wipes the database and imports from the metadata directory. Returns the job ID

MetadataScan.description: Start a scan. Returns the job ID

Migrate.description: Migrates the schema to the required version. Returns the job ID

MigrateBlobs.description: Migrates blobs from the old storage system to the current one

MigrateHashNaming.description: Migrate generated files for the current hash naming

MigrateSceneScreenshots.description: Migrates legacy scene screenshot files into the blob storage

MoveFiles.description:
Moves the given files to the given destination. Returns true if successful.
Either the destination_folder or destination_folder_id must be provided.
If both are provided, the destination_folder_id takes precedence.
Destination folder must be a subfolder of one of the stash library paths.
If provided, destination_basename must be a valid filename with an extension that
matches one of the media extensions.
Creates folder hierarchy if needed.

OptimiseDatabase.description: Optimises the database. Returns the job ID

QuerySQL.description: DANGEROUS: Execute an arbitrary SQL statement that returns rows.

RemoveTempDLNAIP.description: Removes an IP address from the temporary DLNA whitelist

ReorderSubGroups.description: Reorder sub groups within a group. Returns true if successful.

RevealFileInFileManager.description: Reveal the file in the system file manager

RevealFolderInFileManager.description: Reveal the folder in the system file manager

RunPluginOperation.description:
Runs a plugin operation. The operation is run immediately and does not use the job queue.
Returns a map of the result.

RunPluginTask.description:
Run a plugin task.
If task_name is provided, then the task must exist in the plugin config and the tasks configuration
will be used to run the plugin.
If no task_name is provided, then the plugin will be executed with the arguments provided only.
Returns the job ID

args.name: task_name
args.description: if provided, then the default args will be applied

SceneAddO.description: Increments the o-counter for a scene. Uses the current time if none provided.

SceneAddPlay.description: Increments the play count for the scene. Uses the current time if none provided.

SceneDecrementO.description: Decrements the o-counter for a scene. Returns the new value

SceneDeleteO.description: Decrements the o-counter for a scene, removing the last recorded time if specific time not provided. Returns the new value

SceneDeletePlay.description: Decrements the play count for the scene, removing the specific times or the last recorded time if not provided.

SceneGenerateScreenshot.description: Generates screenshot at specified time in seconds. Leave empty to generate default screenshot

SceneIncrementO.description: Increments the o-counter for a scene. Returns the new value

SceneIncrementPlayCount.description: Increments the play count for the scene. Returns the new play count value.

SceneMarkerTags.description: Organize scene markers by tag for a given scene ID

SceneResetActivity.description: Resets the resume time point and play duration

SceneResetO.description: Resets the o-counter for a scene to 0. Returns the new value

SceneResetPlayCount.description: Resets the play count for a scene to 0. Returns the new play count value.

SceneSaveActivity.description: Sets the resume time point (if provided) and adds the provided duration to the scene's play duration

SceneWall.description: Retrieve random scenes for the wall

ScrapeGalleryURL.description: Scrapes a complete gallery record based on a URL

ScrapeGroupURL.description: Scrapes a complete group record based on a URL

ScrapeImageURL.description: Scrapes a complete image record based on a URL

ScrapeMovieURL.description: Scrapes a complete movie record based on a URL

ScrapePerformerURL.description: Scrapes a complete performer record based on a URL

ScrapeSceneURL.description: Scrapes a complete scene record based on a URL

ScrapeURL.description: Scrapes content based on a URL

SetPluginsEnabled.description:
Enable/disable plugins - enabledMap is a map of plugin IDs to enabled booleans.
Plugins not in the map are not affected.

StashBoxBatchPerformerTag.description: Run batch performer tag task. Returns the job ID.

StashBoxBatchStudioTag.description: Run batch studio tag task. Returns the job ID.

StashBoxBatchTagTag.description: Run batch tag tag task. Returns the job ID.

SubmitStashBoxPerformerDraft.description: Submit performer as draft to stash-box instance

SubmitStashBoxSceneDraft.description: Submit scene as draft to stash-box instance

UninstallPackages.description:
Uninstalls the given packages.
If an error occurs when uninstalling a package, the job will continue to uninstall the remaining packages.
Returns the job ID

UpdatePackages.description:
Updates the given packages.
If a package is not installed, it will not be installed.
If a package does not need to be updated, it will not be updated.
If no packages are provided, all packages of the given type will be updated.
If an error occurs when updating a package, the job will continue to update the remaining packages.
Returns the job ID.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Duration to enable, in minutes. 0 or null for indefinite.

fields.name: paths
fields.description: Paths to tag, null for all files

fields.name: performers
fields.description: IDs of performers to tag files with, or "*" for all

fields.name: studios
fields.description: IDs of studios to tag files with, or "*" for all

fields.name: tags
fields.description: IDs of tags to tag files with, or "*" for all

fields.name: includeBlobs
fields.description: If true, blob files will be included in the backup. This can significantly increase the size of the backup and the time it takes to create it, but allows for a complete backup of the system that can be restored without needing access to the original media files.

fields.name: alias_list
fields.description: Duplicate aliases and those equal to name will result in an error (case-insensitive)

fields.name: aliases
fields.description: Duplicate aliases and those equal to name will result in an error (case-insensitive)

fields.name: blobFiles
fields.description: Clean blob files without blob entries

fields.name: sprites
fields.description: Clean sprite and vtt files without scene entries

fields.name: screenshots
fields.description: Clean preview files without scene entries

fields.name: transcodes
fields.description: Clean scene transcodes without scene entries

fields.name: markers
fields.description: Clean marker files without marker entries

fields.name: imageThumbnails
fields.description: Clean image thumbnails/clips without image entries

fields.name: dryRun
fields.description: Do a dry run. Don't delete any files

fields.name: ignoreZipFileContents
fields.description:
Don't check zip file contents when determining whether to clean a file.
This can significantly speed up the clean process, but will potentially miss removed files within zip files.
Where users do not modify zip files contents directly, this should be safe to use.
Defaults to false.

fields.name: dryRun
fields.description: Do a dry run. Don't delete any files

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: True if DLNA service should be enabled by default

fields.name: port
fields.description: Defaults to 1338

fields.name: whitelistedIPs
fields.description: List of IPs whitelisted for DLNA service

fields.name: interfaces
fields.description: List of interfaces to run DLNA on. Empty for all

fields.name: videoSortOrder
fields.description: Order to sort videos

fields.name: deleteFile
fields.description: If true, delete file checkbox will be checked by default

fields.name: deleteGenerated
fields.description: If true, delete generated files checkbox will be checked by default

fields.name: stashes
fields.description: Array of file paths to content

fields.name: databasePath
fields.description: Path to the SQLite database

fields.name: backupDirectoryPath
fields.description: Path to backup directory

fields.name: deleteTrashPath
fields.description: Path to trash directory - if set, deleted files will be moved here instead of being permanently deleted

fields.name: generatedPath
fields.description: Path to generated files

fields.name: metadataPath
fields.description: Path to import/export files

fields.name: scrapersPath
fields.description: Path to scrapers

fields.name: pluginsPath
fields.description: Path to plugins

fields.name: cachePath
fields.description: Path to cache

fields.name: blobsPath
fields.description: Path to blobs - required for filesystem blob storage

fields.name: blobsStorage
fields.description: Where to store blobs

fields.name: ffmpegPath
fields.description: Path to the ffmpeg binary. If empty, stash will attempt to find it in the path or config directory

fields.name: ffprobePath
fields.description: Path to the ffprobe binary. If empty, stash will attempt to find it in the path or config directory

fields.name: calculateMD5
fields.description: Whether to calculate MD5 checksums for scene video files

fields.name: videoFileNamingAlgorithm
fields.description: Hash algorithm to use for generated file naming

fields.name: parallelTasks
fields.description: Number of parallel tasks to start during scan/generate

fields.name: previewAudio
fields.description: Include audio stream in previews

fields.name: previewSegments
fields.description: Number of segments in a preview file

fields.name: previewSegmentDuration
fields.description: Preview segment duration, in seconds

fields.name: previewExcludeStart
fields.description: Duration of start of video to exclude when generating previews

fields.name: previewExcludeEnd
fields.description: Duration of end of video to exclude when generating previews

fields.name: previewPreset
fields.description: Preset when generating preview

fields.name: transcodeHardwareAcceleration
fields.description: Transcode Hardware Acceleration

fields.name: maxTranscodeSize
fields.description: Max generated transcode size

fields.name: maxStreamingTranscodeSize
fields.description: Max streaming transcode size

fields.name: transcodeInputArgs
fields.description:
ffmpeg transcode input args - injected before input file
These are applied to generated transcodes (previews and transcodes)

fields.name: transcodeOutputArgs
fields.description:
ffmpeg transcode output args - injected before output file
These are applied to generated transcodes (previews and transcodes)

fields.name: liveTranscodeInputArgs
fields.description:
ffmpeg stream input args - injected before input file
These are applied when live transcoding

fields.name: liveTranscodeOutputArgs
fields.description:
ffmpeg stream output args - injected before output file
These are applied when live transcoding

fields.name: drawFunscriptHeatmapRange
fields.description: whether to include range in generated funscript heatmaps

fields.name: writeImageThumbnails
fields.description: Write image thumbnails to disk when generating on the fly

fields.name: createImageClipsFromVideos
fields.description: Create Image Clips from Video extensions when Videos are disabled in Library

fields.name: username
fields.description: Username

fields.name: password
fields.description: Password

fields.name: maxSessionAge
fields.description: Maximum session cookie age

fields.name: logFile
fields.description: Name of the log file

fields.name: logOut
fields.description: Whether to also output to stderr

fields.name: logLevel
fields.description: Minimum log level

fields.name: logAccess
fields.description: Whether to log http access

fields.name: logFileMaxSize
fields.description: Maximum log size

fields.name: createGalleriesFromFolders
fields.description: True if galleries should be created from folders with images

fields.name: galleryCoverRegex
fields.description: Regex used to identify images as gallery covers

fields.name: videoExtensions
fields.description: Array of video file extensions

fields.name: imageExtensions
fields.description: Array of image file extensions

fields.name: galleryExtensions
fields.description: Array of gallery zip file extensions

fields.name: excludes
fields.description: Array of file regexp to exclude from Video Scans

fields.name: imageExcludes
fields.description: Array of file regexp to exclude from Image Scans

fields.name: customPerformerImageLocation
fields.description: Custom Performer Image Location

fields.name: stashBoxes
fields.description: Stash-box instances used for tagging

fields.name: pythonPath
fields.description: Python path - resolved using path if unset

fields.name: scraperPackageSources
fields.description: Source of scraper packages

fields.name: pluginPackageSources
fields.description: Source of plugin packages

fields.name: spriteScreenshotSize
fields.description: Size of the longest dimension for each sprite in pixels

fields.name: useCustomSpriteInterval
fields.description: True if sprite generation should use the sprite interval and min/max sprites settings instead of the default

fields.name: spriteInterval
fields.description: Time between two different scrubber sprites in seconds - only used if useCustomSpriteInterval is true

fields.name: minimumSprites
fields.description: Minimum number of sprites to be generated - only used if useCustomSpriteInterval is true

fields.name: maximumSprites
fields.description: Minimum number of sprites to be generated - only used if useCustomSpriteInterval is true

fields.name: sfwContentMode
fields.description: True if SFW content mode is enabled

fields.name: menuItems
fields.description: Ordered list of items that should be shown in the menu

fields.name: soundOnPreview
fields.description: Enable sound on mouseover previews

fields.name: wallShowTitle
fields.description: Show title and tags in wall view

fields.name: wallPlayback
fields.description: Wall playback type

fields.name: showScrubber
fields.description: Show scene scrubber by default

fields.name: maximumLoopDuration
fields.description: Maximum duration (in seconds) in which a scene video will loop in the scene player

fields.name: autostartVideo
fields.description: If true, video will autostart on load in the scene player

fields.name: autostartVideoOnPlaySelected
fields.description: If true, video will autostart when loading from play random or play selected

fields.name: continuePlaylistDefault
fields.description: If true, next scene in playlist will be played at video end by default

fields.name: showStudioAsText
fields.description: If true, studio overlays will be shown as text instead of logo images

fields.name: css
fields.description: Custom CSS

fields.name: javascript
fields.description: Custom Javascript

fields.name: customLocales
fields.description: Custom Locales

fields.name: disableCustomizations
fields.description: When true, disables all customizations (plugins, CSS, JavaScript, locales) for troubleshooting

fields.name: language
fields.description: Interface language

fields.name: disableDropdownCreate
fields.description: Set to true to disable creating new objects via the dropdown menus

fields.name: handyKey

fields.name: funscriptOffset

fields.name: useStashHostedFunscript
fields.description: Whether to use Stash Hosted Funscript

fields.description: True if we should not auto-open a browser window on startup

fields.name: notificationsEnabled

fields.name: scraperCertCheck

fields.description: If populated, only the keys in this map will be updated

values.description:
For multi-value fields, merge with existing.
For single-value fields, ignore if already set

Always replaces the value if a value is found.
For multi-value fields, any existing values are removed and replaced with the
scraped values.

StashBoxBatchTagInput.description:
Accepts either ids, or a combination of names and stash_ids.
If none are set, then all existing items will be tagged.
